name: Non-Disclosure Agreement (Mutual)

confidentialInfo.label: Types of Confidential Information
confidentialInfo.placeholder: Technical data, business plans, trade secrets, financial information, etc.

content:
MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of {{effectiveDate}} between {{partyA}} ("Party A") and {{partyB}} ("Party B").

WHEREAS, the parties desire to disclose certain confidential and proprietary information to each other;

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and agreements contained herein, the parties agree as follows:

1. CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION
Confidential Information means all non-public, proprietary information disclosed by either party to the other, including but not limited to: {{confidentialInfo}}

2. OBLIGATIONS
Each party agrees to:
(a) Maintain the confidentiality of all Confidential Information received from the other party
(b) Limit disclosure to employees and authorized representatives who need to know
(c) Use the information solely for evaluation and business purposes
(d) Protect the information with reasonable security measures consistent with industry standards
(e) Not reverse engineer, disassemble, or attempt to derive the underlying processes of Confidential Information

3. DURATION
Each party's obligation to maintain confidentiality shall continue for {{duration}} years from the date of disclosure, unless otherwise provided by law.

4. EXCLUSIONS
Confidential Information does not include information that:
(a) Is already in the public domain or becomes public through no breach of this Agreement
(b) Was independently developed without use of or reference to Confidential Information
(c) Is rightfully received from third parties without confidentiality obligations
(d) Is required to be disclosed by law, regulation, or court order, provided the disclosing party gives prompt notice to allow the other party to seek protective measures

5. RETURN OF INFORMATION
Upon termination of this Agreement or upon request, each party shall:
(a) Return or destroy all Confidential Information in its possession
(b) Certify in writing the destruction or return of such information
(c) Retain one archival copy if required by law

6. NO OBLIGATION
Neither party is obligated to disclose any information or proceed with any business relationship. This Agreement does not create a partnership, joint venture, or agency relationship.

7. DISCLAIMER
CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND. NEITHER PARTY MAKES ANY WARRANTY, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, REGARDING THE ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS, OR NON-INFRINGEMENT OF CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION.

8. GOVERNING LAW
This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of {{jurisdiction}}, without regard to conflicts of law principles.

9. ENTIRE AGREEMENT
This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties regarding the subject matter and supersedes all prior negotiations, understandings, and agreements, whether written or oral.

10. SEVERABILITY
If any provision of this Agreement is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first written above.

PARTY A: {{partyA}}
By: _____________________
Name: ___________________
Title: ____________________
Date: ____________________

PARTY B: {{partyB}}
By: _____________________
Name: ___________________
Title: ____________________
Date: ____________________
